'''Frundle's Cantina''' was a local in the city of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]], on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It was known to have expensive drinks on tap, and therefore loss business to surrounding pubs.

On [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], local [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] informer [[Talbrek]] staged a meeting between [[Army of Life]] agent [[Del Binjitt]] and some independent agents he wanted to hire to transport [[clodhopper]] eggs to [[Stend IV]]. Binjitt hired the agents and gave them valuable information. However, the bartender droid was eavesdropping and reported its discoveries to the authorities, who were watching Binjitt.
